title: Concord Apartments Nakasero
description: 4 blocks comprising 64 apartments with spacious penthouses and ample parking. Designed for modern urban living in Kampala's most sought-after address.

title: CK Apartments
description: 2 blocks of G+7 buildings including 4 penthouses, 24 three-bedroom apartments, lift, and 30-car parking.

title: CK Commercial Building
description: Development of a G+3 commercial building including warehouse, office floors, and rooftop café and restaurant.

title: Katwe Shopping Mall
description: Parking basement plus 4-storey commercial building covering 6,825 SM with 98 commercial units.

title: Naguru Police Apartment Blocks
description: Seven blocks housing 420 families — 60 apartments per block, 4 units per floor; fully self-contained.

title: Kaweweta Military Training Cantonments
description: Large-scale military cantonment including 16 dormitory blocks, 13 classroom blocks, 2 messes (capacity 1,500), admin block, senior quarters, 30,000 SM paved parade ground, and 3 km asphalt road with drainage.

title: Telecommunication Repeater Stations
description: 15 communication repeater stations across 6 zones; includes tower foundations, solar systems, and equipment buildings.

title: Bor Hospital Laboratory Extension
description: Extension of laboratory building at Bor Hospital, Jonglei State.
